message:
fix: implement showConfigYAMLOverrides to warn about config precedence (bd-rq2w)

The empty TODO stub meant `bd config list` silently showed DB values
that might not match effective config due to config.yaml or env var
overrides. Now the function:
- Lists yaml-only keys set in config.yaml (not visible in DB output)
- Warns when BD_* env vars override displayed DB config values

Executed-By: beads/polecats/garnet
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
